image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: T cells hunt infected cells and coordinate immune responses. But how do they do it?
Context visual: T cells are a type of white blood cell crucial for your immune defense. They recognize and destroy cells that are infect
Escalation visual: Imagine tiny warriors navigating your body, seeking out threats. This is how T cells patrol your system.
Evidence visual: Recent studies show T cells also help other immune cells function better, like a conductor in an orchestra.
Payoff visual: So, without T cells, your body would struggle to fend off infections. They are vital to your health!
Cta visual: Curious about more immune secrets? Hit like and follow for more science insights!
